tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Song: American Honey
Artist: Lady Antebellum


[Intro] 

[ch]C[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
She grew up on the side of the road[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Where the church bells ring and strong love grows[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
She grew up good, She grew up slow[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Like American honey[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Steady as a preacher, free as a weed[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Couldn't wait to get going but wasn't quite ready to leave[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
So innocent, pure and sweet[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
American honey[/tab]


[Chorus] 

[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
There's a wild, wild whisper blowin' in the wind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Callin' out my name like a long lost friend[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, I miss those days as the years go by[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, nothin' sweeter than summertime[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
And American honey[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Get caught in the race of this crazy life[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Tryin' to be everything can make you lose your mind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
I just wanna go back in time[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
To American honey[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]

[Bridge]

Gone for so long now[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
I gotta get back to her somehow[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
To American honey[/tab]
